acceptconnectionproposal.name: AcceptConnectionProposal
acceptconnectionproposal.description: Grants permission to accept a connection proposal generated elsewhere

createconnection.name: CreateConnection
createconnection.description: Grants permission to create a connection

deleteconnection.name: DeleteConnection
deleteconnection.description: Grants permission to delete an existing connection

describeconnectionproposal.name: DescribeConnectionProposal
describeconnectionproposal.description: Grants permission to describe a connection proposal

getconnection.name: GetConnection
getconnection.description: Grants permission to describe a connection

getenvironment.name: GetEnvironment
getenvironment.description: Grants permission to describe an environment

listattachpoints.name: ListAttachPoints
listattachpoints.description: Grants permission to list available attach points

listenvironments.name: ListEnvironments
listenvironments.description: Grants permission to list available environments

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to list tags on a resource

tagresource.name: TagResource
tagresource.description: Grants permission to apply tags to a resource

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource

updateconnection.name: UpdateConnection
updateconnection.description: Grants permission to update an existing connection
